titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co. records, 1892-1935.
New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co. records, 1892-1935.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the New York And Pennsylvania Railway Co. Records,1892-1935
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co. records,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co.

did.physdesc: Organizational records, financial records, correspondence, printed materials, and blueprints.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Daily, monthly, and yearly records of the operation of the railroad.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Daily, monthly, and yearly records of the operation of the railroad, including account books, letter books and correspondence, blueprints of construction and rights of way, company stock, schedules, tariffs, coupons, state, interstate, and federal reports, tickets, and excursion handbills.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co.

unittitle.extref: Link to a PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York and Pennsylvania Railway Co. records, #358. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
